name: Ranger Joe Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream Crisco, brown sugar, white sugar, and 4 beaten eggs together in a large bowl. Stir in vanilla.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt until combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the Crisco mixture, stirring continuously. If necessary, add 1 tablespoon of water to achieve a workable consistency.
4. Mix in Rice Krispies, rolled oats, coconut, pecans, and chocolate chips by hand.
5. Form dough into small to medium balls and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Flatten each ball with a fork.
7. Bake at 325°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Cool cookies completely before storing.
This recipe yields at least 8 dozen cookies. It can be adjusted by halving the ingredients if desired. The dough can also be refrigerated overnight for easier handling.
